calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2010 Continued To May-28-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

David Balter, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Fulcrum Legal Graphics, Inc., a California corporation.
Kevin Hout, President of Fulcrum Legal Graphics, Inc., was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Proview International Holding, Ltd., Proview Technology (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd. or Proview Technology, Inc.
Defaults were entered against defendants on December 24, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 14, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Fulcrum Legal Graphics, Inc., a California corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendants Proview International Holding, Ltd., Proview Technology (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd. and Proview Technology, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $157,751.28.
Prejudgment Interest - $20,702.38.
Costs - $935.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $179,388.66.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2010 Continued To Mar-26-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
